name: roadmapsmith
description: One-command evidence-backed ROADMAP.md generator and sync tool for AI coding agents, with shared RoadmapSmith plugin skills for Codex and Claude.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-backed roadmap workflows for AI coding agents
interface.longDescription: Install RoadmapSmith in Codex to expose the shared skills bundle for zero-mode onboarding, existing-repo maintenance, roadmap discovery, and evidence-backed validation while keeping the CLI and Claude bundle surfaces aligned.
defaultPrompt: Help me bootstrap or maintain this repository roadmap with RoadmapSmith.
